'''Matu''' was a male [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] thug who worked for the [[Exchange]] under the command of [[Benok]], the chief of security, and [[Loppak Slusk]], the Exchange boss on [[Citadel Station]]. He was one of the best melee fighters in Loppak's force, wielding twin [[Rodian death blade]]s with deadly precision. He was an intimidating presence and most opponents merely had to be threatened by him or by his name in order to yield. Matu, alongside Benok and [[Nahata]], were killed in a [[Skirmishes on Citadel Station|brawl]] with [[Meetra Surik]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
